step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with the chosen answer D: Post-surgical atony or ileus. One additional point supporting this decision is that cholinomimetics could exacerbate abdominal pain and discomfort commonly experienced during postoperative recovery if they were to enhance gastrointestinal motility prematurely before full recovery has occurred. Disagreeing would imply overlooking the significant risks posed by uncontrolled gut motility in an already compromised state due to recent surgery. Therefore, I confirm agreement with option D being correct. Answer: D.
